signal: Discord video message (13MB mp4) causes inbound worker to hang for 30min — no independent attachment download timeout
notes: Upstream limitation confirmed. inboundWorker shares timeout between attachment download and LLM run. No local fix possible. Will re-open if OpenClaw releases a fix we need to adopt.

signal: announce delivery.mode silently fails for some channels — version check cron messages never appeared despite gateway logging res ✓
notes: All 6 cron jobs that need user-visible output now use explicit message tool in prompt as primary delivery. announce kept as redundant fallback. Root cause unclear but impact fully mitigated.
